read"]}]]}],["$","h1",null,{"className":"text-3xl md:text-4xl font-serif italic leading-tight mb-6 text-balance","children":"How We Built Zaplit Using Our Own Agent Teams"}],["$","p",null,{"className":"text-lg text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed border-l-2 border-border pl-4","children":"We use our own Secretary, Research, and Support agents to run daily operations. Here's what we learned."}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"border-t border-border mb-12"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"prose-zaplit","children":[["$","h2","0",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"Eating Our Own Cooking"}],["$","p","1",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["From day one, we've run Zaplit's internal operations using Zaplit agents. This was partly a forcing function—we needed to know our product worked before we asked clients to trust it—and partly genuinely the fastest way to get things done with a small team."]}],"$Lf","$L10","$L11","$L12","$L13","$L14","$L15","$L16","$L17","$L18","$L19","$L1a","$L1b","$L1c","$L1d","$L1e","$L1f","$L20","$L21","$L22"]}],"$L23","$L24","$L25"]}]}],"$L26"]}]
f:["$","p","2",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["Here's what we actually use, and what we learned."]}]
10:["$","h2","3",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"The Secretary Agent"}]
11:["$","p","4",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["The Secretary agent is the orchestrator. It handles task routing, follow-up tracking, and meeting coordination. When someone on the team says \"we need to follow up with the Johnson account next Tuesday,\" Secretary creates the task, assigns it, and surfaces it at the right time."]}]
12:["$","p","5",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["What surprised us: how much cognitive overhead this removes. Not having to remember to follow up, not having to track down who said what would happen—it sounds small until you've lived without that overhead for a week."]}]
13:["$","p","6",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["What we learned: The Secretary agent is most valuable when it has context. We invested time in building good integrations with our communication tools so it has the full picture of what's happening."]}]
14:["$","h2","7",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"The Research Agent"}]
15:["$","p","8",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["The Research agent handles competitive intelligence, market monitoring, and document analysis. When we're evaluating a potential technology partner, Research pulls together a briefing—product overview, pricing, customer reviews, recent news—in minutes."]}]
16:["$","p","9",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["What surprised us: the quality of synthesis. We expected to get data back and still need to analyze it ourselves. Instead, we get structured analysis with key takeaways and flags for things that need human attention."]}]
17:["$","p","10",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["What we learned: Research is only as good as its prompts and scope. Early on, we got reports that were technically accurate but missed what we actually wanted to know. Investing in clear briefing templates paid off immediately."]}]
18:["$","h2","11",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"The Support Agent"}]
19:["$","p","12",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["The Support agent handles first-line responses to inbound inquiries—from potential clients, from existing clients, and from general contact form submissions."]}]
1a:["$","p","13",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["It drafts every response. Nothing goes out without a human reviewing and approving it. This isn't slowness—it's us staying in the loop on every conversation that matters while the agent handles the drafting."]}]
1b:["$","p","14",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["What surprised us: how much tone matters. We spent more time calibrating the Support agent's communication style than any other agent. Once we got it right, responses stopped feeling like they came from a bot."]}]
1c:["$","p","15",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["What we learned: Training the agent with examples from our best human communications, not generic templates, was the key to getting tone right."]}]
1d:["$","h2","16",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"What Running on Your Own Product Teaches You"}]
1e:["$","p","17",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["You find the bugs. The edge cases. The moments where the product asks too much of the user or gives too little context. Using Zaplit every day meant we shipped fixes to real friction points that might have taken months to surface through external feedback."]}]
1f:["$","p","18",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["It also meant we were never shipping something we weren't confident in. If we weren't comfortable with our own agents doing something, we didn't ask clients to be comfortable with it either."]}]
20:["$","h2","19",{"className":"text-2xl font-serif italic mt-12 mb-4 text-foreground","children":"The Meta-Lesson"}]
21:["$","p","20",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["Building a company with AI agents isn't about removing humans. It's about deploying human attention where it creates the most value. Our team focuses on product, client relationships, and strategic decisions. The agents handle coordination, research, and communications volume."]}]
22:["$","p","21",{"className":"text-muted-foreground leading-relaxed mb-4","children":["We're a small team doing work that used to take a much larger one. That's the promise of Zaplit—and it works because we built it to keep humans in control the whole way."]}]
23:["$","div",null,{"className":"border-t border-border mt-16 pt-12"}]
24:["$","div",null,{"className":"grid grid-cols-2 gap-6","children":[["$","div",null,{}],["$","$Le",null,{"href":"/blog/human-in-the-loop","className":"group flex flex-col gap-1 bg-card border border-border rounded-xl p-4 hover:border-muted-foreground transition-colors text-right col-start-2","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"text-xs text-muted-foreground flex items-center justify-end gap-1","children":["Newer ",["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide lucide-arrow-right w-3 h-3","aria-hidden":"true","children":[["$","path","1ays0h",{"d":"M5 12h14"}],["$","path","xquz4c",{"d":"m12 5 7 7-7 7"}],"$undefined"]}]]}],["$","span",null,{"className":"text-sm font-medium leading-snug group-hover:text-foreground transition-colors line-clamp-2","children":"The Human-in-the-Loop Approach to Business Automation"}]]}]]}]
25:["$","div",null,{"className":"mt-12 text-center","children":["$","$Le",null,{"href":"/blog","children":[["$","svg",null,{"ref":"$undefined","xmlns":"http://www.w3.org/2000/svg","width":24,"height":24,"viewBox":"0 0 24 24","fill":"none","stroke":"currentColor","strokeWidth":2,"strokeLinecap":"round","strokeLinejoin":"round","className":"lucide lucide-arrow-left w-4 h-4 mr-2","aria-hidden":"true","children":[["$","path","1l729n",{"d":"m12 19-7-7 7-7"}],["$","path","x3x0zl",{"d":"M19 12H5"}],"$undefined"]}],"Back to all posts"],"data-slot":"button","className":"inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-2 whitespace-nowrap rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-all disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 [&_svg]:pointer-events-none [&_svg:not([class*='size-'])]:size-4 shrink-0 [&_svg]:shrink-0 outline-none focus-visible:border-ring focus-visible:ring-ring/50 focus-visible:ring-[3px] aria-invalid:ring-destructive/20 dark:aria-invalid:ring-destructive/40 aria-invalid:border-destructive border bg-background shadow-xs hover:bg-accent hover:text-accent-foreground dark:bg-input/30 dark:border-input dark:hover:bg-input/50 h-9 px-4 py-2 has-[>svg]:px-3","ref":null}]}]
26:["$","footer",null,{"className":"border-t border-border py-8","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"max-w-7xl mx-auto px-6 flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center justify-between gap-4","children":[["$","p",null,{"className":"text-xs text-muted-foreground","children":["© ",2026," Zaplit.
